cards.title: Advanced Yoga Therapeutics
cards._legacyHtml:
📋 Content Coming SoonThis card will contain:
  • Disease-specific asana protocols (45+ conditions)
  • Pranayama for specific systems (respiratory, cardiac, neurological)
  • Shatkarmas: Neti, Trataka, Nauli, Kapalbhati, Basti, Dhauti
  • Yoga Nidra: NSDR protocol (20-min script)
  • Contraindications by condition
